rationale: axon_backend.go implements RawBackend per TD-030 two-collection split; Store routes beads.backend=axon behind DDX_AXON_EXPERIMENTAL flag; 15 unit tests cover all named AC ops (create/update/close, deps, list/ready/blocked, claim, events, archive, JSONL round-trip); execution evidence reports tests green.

findings.summary: AC §1 names 'Backend interface' but implementation is RawBackend; this is consistent with the layered design (Store exposes Backend, delegates to RawBackend) and matches the parent TD's contract.
manifest.json contains ~150 stale 'preflight_rejected' disruption events from a prior failed attempt; harmless evidence noise but inflates the evidence file substantially.
